channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [NEOGEN] Neogen Chemicals Ltd. Approves Issue of 1000000 Equity Shares on Preferential Basis
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Neogen Chemicals Ltd. announced the outcome of their board meeting, which approved the issuance of 1000000 equity shares on a preferential basis. The shares, with a face value of Rs. 10 each, will be issued at a price of Rs. 1,610 per share, including a premium of Rs. 1,600 per share. The total amount for this preferential issue is Rs. 161,00,00,000. The board also approved the convening of an Extra Ordinary General Meeting (EGM) for the members' approval. The record date for deciding eligibility of members for remote e-voting and attending the EGM is March 20, 2026.

  • Issuance of 1000000 equity shares on preferential basis
  • Issue price of Rs. 1,610 per share including a premium of Rs. 1,600
  • Total amount for the preferential issue is Rs. 161,00,00,000
  • Convening of an Extra Ordinary General Meeting (EGM) for members' approval
  • Record date for deciding eligibility of members for remote e-voting and attending the EGM is March 20, 2026

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Neogen Chemicals Ltd | Category: Investment

item.title: [NEOGEN] Neogen Chemicals Ltd Approves Issue of 1000000 Equity Shares on Preferential Basis
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Neogen Chemicals Ltd has approved the issuance of 10,00,000 Equity Shares of face value of Rs. 10/- each at a price of Rs. 1,610 per Equity Share including a premium of Rs. 1,600 per Equity Share, aggregating to Rs. 1,61,00,00,000 on a preferential basis. The decision was made at the Board of Directors meeting held on March 7, 2026. The issuance is subject to the approval of the Members of the Company and statutory and regulatory approvals including SEBI approval. The company will convene an Extra Ordinary General Meeting (EGM) of the Members on March 29, 2026, for seeking their approval for the Preferential Issue.

  • Neogen Chemicals Ltd approves the issuance of 10,00,000 Equity Shares on a preferential basis
  • The issuance is at a price of Rs. 1,610 per Equity Share including a premium of Rs. 1,600 per Equity Share
  • The total amount for the securities is Rs. 1,61,00,00,000
  • The decision is subject to the approval of the Members of the Company and statutory and regulatory approvals including SEBI approval
  • An Extra Ordinary General Meeting (EGM) of the Members will be convened on March 29, 2026, for seeking their approval for the Preferential Issue

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Neogen Chemicals Ltd | Category: Investment

item.title: [NEOGEN] Neogen Chemicals Ltd. Approves Issue of 1000000 Equity Shares on Preferential Basis
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Neogen Chemicals Ltd. announced the outcome of their Board meeting, which approved the issuance of 1000000 equity shares on a preferential basis. The shares, with a face value of Rs. 10 each, will be issued at a price of Rs. 1,610 per share, including a premium of Rs. 1,600 per share. This amounts to a total of Rs. 161,00,00,000. The decision is subject to the approval of the Members of the Company and various statutory and regulatory approvals, including SEBI approval. The company also announced the convening of an Extra Ordinary General Meeting (EGM) of the Members of the Company for the approval of the Preferential Issue.

  • Issuance of 1000000 equity shares on a preferential basis
  • Issue price of Rs. 1,610 per share including a premium of Rs. 1,600
  • Subject to approval of Members of the Company and various statutory and regulatory approvals
  • Convening of an Extra Ordinary General Meeting (EGM) of the Members of the Company for the approval of the Preferential Issue
  • Lock-in period of 18 months from the date of trading approval for the specified securities

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Neogen Chemicals Ltd | Category: Quarterly Updates

item.title: [NECLIFE] Nectar Lifesciences Ltd. Wins Legal Battle Against Sanjay Chemicals India Private Limited with No Liability
item.description:
Nectar Lifesciences Ltd. has successfully defended a legal case filed by Sanjay Chemicals India Private Limited in the Mumbai City Civil Commercial Court. The Hon'ble Court returned the plaint to the Plaintiff, citing a lack of jurisdiction to hear the matter. The Plaintiff had sought recovery of a ₹ 43,30,914 principal amount, 21% interest, and a ₹ 2,00,000 penalty. The Company argued that the Court lacked jurisdiction and that the claims were time-barred, resulting in the dismissal of the suit with no liability or action against the company.

  • Nectar Lifesciences Ltd. wins legal battle against Sanjay Chemicals India Private Limited.
  • The case was filed in the Mumbai City Civil Commercial Court.
  • The Hon'ble Court returned the plaint to the Plaintiff due to lack of jurisdiction.
  • The Plaintiff sought recovery of ₹ 43,30,914 principal amount, 21% interest, and ₹ 2,00,000 penalty.
  • The suit was dismissed with no liability or action against Nectar Lifesciences Ltd.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: NECTAR LIFESCIENCES LTD. | Category: Legal

item.title: [ISTRNETWK] iStreet Network Ltd Allots 18,33,334 Equity Shares Following Warrant Conversion
item.description:
🔥 Trending

iStreet Network Ltd has allotted 18,33,334 equity shares pursuant to the conversion of warrants by warrant holders. The allotment was made for a cash consideration of ₹ 1,10,00,004 (Rupees One Crore Ten Lacs and Four Only) upon the receipt of the exercise price of ₹ 4.5 per share warrant. The allotted shares will rank pari-passu with the existing equity shares of the company. The paid-up equity share capital of the company has increased from ₹ 26,58,66,672 to ₹ 27,32,00,008 post the allotment.

  • iStreet Network Ltd allotted 18,33,334 equity shares following warrant conversion.
  • The allotment was made for a cash consideration of ₹ 1,10,00,004.
  • The allotted shares will rank pari-passu with the existing equity shares of the company.
  • The paid-up equity share capital of the company has increased from ₹ 26,58,66,672 to ₹ 27,32,00,008 post the allotment.
  • Warrants were allotted on November 28, 2025, carrying a right to subscribe to 1 Equity Share per warrant.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: iStreet Network Limited | Category: Transmission of Shares

item.title: [DIGISPICE] Digispice Technologies Ltd. Files Scheme with NCLT for Amalgamation with Three Other Companies
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Digispice Technologies Ltd. has filed a joint application with the National Company Law Tribunal (NCLT), Delhi Bench, for a Scheme of Amalgamation with Spice Money Limited, E-arth Travel Solutions Private Limited, and Vikasni Fintech Private Limited. The Scheme is contingent upon obtaining necessary statutory and regulatory clearances, including approvals from the NCLT, other competent authorities, and the respective shareholders and creditors of the companies involved. The application was filed at 02:20 A.M. this morning.

  • Digispice Technologies Ltd. files Scheme of Amalgamation with NCLT
  • Involves Spice Money Limited, E-arth Travel Solutions Private Limited, and Vikasni Fintech Private Limited
  • Contingent upon obtaining necessary statutory and regulatory clearances
  • Includes approvals from NCLT, other competent authorities, and respective shareholders and creditors
  • Filed at 02:20 A.M. today

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Digispice Technologies Ltd-$ | Category: Deals

item.title: [VTL] Vardhman Textiles Commences Commercial Production at Expanded Processing Facility
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Vardhman Textiles Ltd. has started commercial production from a new processing line at Vardhman Fabrics, Budhni, Madhya Pradesh. This development is a part of the company's capex plan to expand processed fabric capacity by about 31 million meters per annum. The commercial production begins following intimations dated 28th November, 2024 and 22nd January, 2025.

  • Vardhman Textiles commences commercial production at expanded processing facility.
  • New processing line at Vardhman Fabrics, Budhni, Madhya Pradesh starts operation.
  • Company's capex plan includes expansion of processed fabric capacity by about 31 million meters per annum.
  • Development follows intimations dated 28th November, 2024 and 22nd January, 2025.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: VARDHMAN TEXTILES LTD. | Category: New Launch

item.title: [BHARATWIRE] Bharat Wire Ropes Ltd Appoints M/s. Borkar & Muzumdar as New Statutory Auditor
item.description:
Bharat Wire Ropes Ltd has appointed M/s. Borkar & Muzumdar, Chartered Accountants as the new Statutory Auditor of the company. This appointment is to fill the casual vacancy caused by the resignation of M/s. CNK & Associates LLP. The appointment is subject to the approval of the shareholders at the ensuing General Meeting. M/s. Borkar & Muzumdar is a reputed firm with over 75 years of experience, offering a wide array of specialized services including Assurance, Taxation Consultancy and Financial Advisory Services. They have experience in Statutory Audit for Manufacturing, Service Companies and have been extending services as the Statutory Central Auditors of several Public and Private Sector Banks, other Private and Public Sector Undertakings, NBFCs, Insurance Companies.

  • Bharat Wire Ropes Ltd has appointed M/s. Borkar & Muzumdar as the new Statutory Auditor.
  • The appointment is to fill the casual vacancy caused by the resignation of M/s. CNK & Associates LLP.
  • M/s. Borkar & Muzumdar is a reputed firm with over 75 years of experience.
  • They offer a wide array of specialized services including Assurance, Taxation Consultancy and Financial Advisory Services.
  • The appointment is subject to the approval of the shareholders at the ensuing General Meeting.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Bharat Wire Ropes Ltd | Category: Management Change

item.title: [RESPONIND] Promoter Group Fairpoint Tradecom LLP Pledges Shares in Responsive Industries Ltd
item.description:
Responsive Industries Ltd, a company based in Maharashtra, India, has disclosed the creation of pledge by its promoter group, Fairpoint Tradecom LLP. The pledge is for 26,50,000 equity shares in favor of Virtue Financial Services Limited and Imperial Solutions Private Limited. This disclosure is in accordance with the SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011 and the SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015.

  • Fairpoint Tradecom LLP, a promoter group of Responsive Industries Ltd, has created a pledge for 26,50,000 equity shares.
  • The pledge is in favor of Virtue Financial Services Limited and Imperial Solutions Private Limited.
  • This disclosure is in accordance with the SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011 and the SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015.
  • The total promoter company shareholding in Responsive Industries Ltd is 9.25%.
  • The encumbered shares represent 2.73% of the total share capital.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: RESPONSIVE INDUSTRIES LTD. | Category: Pledge

item.title: [OLECTRA] Olectra Greentech Loses Rs. 10.00 Crores Claim in Arbitration with M.L.R. Motors Limited
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Olectra Greentech Limited has informed the exchange about the status of a dispute with M.L.R. Motors Limited. The Arbitral Tribunal, constituted pursuant to the order of the Hon'ble High Court of Telangana, passed an award on March 2, 2026, disallowing Olectra's claim for recovery of a capital advance of Rs. 10.00 Crores made to M.L.R. Motors Limited. The Tribunal directed Olectra to reimburse Rs. 5,00,000 towards cost of arbitration and legal expenses incurred by M.L.R. Motors Limited. Olectra is reviewing the detailed order and considering further actions, including challenging the award before appropriate courts.

  • Olectra Greentech lost a Rs. 10.00 Crores claim in an arbitration with M.L.R. Motors Limited.
  • The Arbitral Tribunal directed Olectra to reimburse Rs. 5,00,000 towards M.L.R. Motors Limited's arbitration and legal expenses.
  • Olectra is reviewing the detailed order and considering further actions, including challenging the award before appropriate courts.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Olectra Greentech Ltd | Category: Legal
